title: limodorum palustre
intro: Limodorum palustre, also known as the Marsh Helleborine, is a perennial orchid native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its roots and flowers. The health benefits of Marsh Helleborine include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its use as a diuretic to help alleviate urinary problems. Herbal preparations of Marsh Helleborine include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
